title: World of Warcraft Vanilla Walkthroughs, Guides & More!
description: Quest database, item lookup, and NPC information for World of Warcraft Vanilla. Works perfectly in Safari Leopard WebKit / Aquafox on the G4.
author: Technologyst Labs
content:
ClassicDB.ch on Your G4

Lightweight database for WoW Vanilla that loads perfectly on the G4.

Features

  • Quest lookup by name or zone
  • Item and NPC databases
  • No heavy scripts
